title: afrolimon longifolium
intro: Afrolimon longifolium, also known as the "Yellow Fever Tree", is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Afrolimon longifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
